content: I made a huge mistake. I'm 52, I retired early from my engineering job to take care of my parents, and now I'm trapped. I thought I was doing the right thing but I've been living with them for 9 months and I'm losing myself. I don't know if I can do this anymore.
[ERROR: 'latin-1' codec can't encode character '\u201c' in position 7: ordinal not in range(256)]

I'm Sam. My parents are 76 and 78. They can do most things themselves, they just move slower now. But my father... he's always been controlling but it's gotten worse. He won't let me turn on the heat past 65 degrees even though I'm paying the utility bills. Last week he told me I 'dress too casually' for someone my age and I need to look more respectable.
[ERROR: 'latin-1' codec can't encode character '\u201c' in position 7: ordinal not in range(256)]

It's always been there but living with them made it 100 times worse. Last month I developed carpal tunnel from doing all their laundry by hand because Dad said I 'use the washing machine wrong.' I'm an engineer. I know how to use a washing machine. When I told him my wrists hurt, he said I was being dramatic.
[ERROR: 'latin-1' codec can't encode character '\u201c' in position 7: ordinal not in range(256)]

I did see a doctor. She said I need to stop the repetitive motion and probably need physical therapy. I haven't told my parents because Dad will say it's a waste of money. Money I'M paying for. I sold my condo to move in here. I'm covering groceries, utilities, their medications. But he acts like I'm a burden.
[ERROR: 'latin-1' codec can't encode character '\u201c' in position 7: ordinal not in range(256)]

If I told them, Dad would say I'm wasting money and being selfish. Last time I said I wanted to visit my friend for a weekend, he said if I'm going to 'abandon' them, maybe I should just move out permanently. When I said okay maybe I will, he said he'd write me out of the will and never speak to me again.
[ERROR: 'latin-1' codec can't encode character '\u201c' in position 7: ordinal not in range(256)]
I want to leave. I want my life back. But I feel so guilty. They're my parents. What if something happens to them and I wasn't there? What if they really do disown me and I lose them forever?
[ERROR: 'latin-1' codec can't encode character '\u201c' in position 7: ordinal not in range(256)]

They could hire someone. They have savings. They just don't want to spend it. They'd rather have me do it for free. And honestly, they don't even NEED full-time help - they just got used to me doing everything. Mom can cook, Dad can drive. They just... won't.
[ERROR: 'latin-1' codec can't encode character '\u201c' in position 7: ordinal not in range(256)]

I think I need to move out. Completely. I can't do the 'I'll visit twice a week' thing because Dad will criticize every visit and Mom will cry. I need distance. But I'm scared I'll regret it. What if I'm making another huge mistake?
[ERROR: 'latin-1' codec can't encode character '\u201c' in position 7: ordinal not in range(256)]

Okay. I think I'm going to start looking for an apartment. I'll give them 30 days notice. I'll offer to help them interview home health aides if they want. But I'm done living here. I'm done being treated like this. Thank you for not telling me I'm abandoning them.
[ERROR: 'latin-1' codec can't encode character '\u201c' in position 7: ordinal not in range(256)]
